source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/11_Audit F-up/240415-17 ISO 갱신심사 & 2,3G MDR 심사 - 3EC/MDR 보완/[2nd response TD by H&abyz] Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector (08 March 2024) word/A-TCF-5-157 Clinical Evaluation/비교제품 근거자료/2.2 Carestream-DRX-1-System brochure.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Carestream brochure for the DRX-1 System describing wireless DR upgrade, compatible detectors, ISO 4090 cassette compatibility, and generator interface modes.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Product information for selecting and using the CARESTREAM DRX-1 System with DRX Plus, Lux 35, Focus, and DRX-L detectors.
keyPoints: The DRX-1 System is designed to upgrade an existing X-ray room to full wireless DR in one day.
The system is compatible with X-ray systems using ISO 4090-compliant 35x43, 43x43 and 25x30 cm cassettes.
The CARESTREAM DRX-1 System works with DRX Plus, Lux 35, Focus, and DRX-L detectors.
The DRX-L Detector captures long-length leg and spine images in a single exposure.

entities.name: CARESTREAM
entities.evidence: CARESTREAM is a trademark of Carestream Health.

entities.name: CARESTREAM DRX-1 System
entities.evidence: The CARESTREAM DRX-1 System works with our DRX Plus, Lux 35 and Focus Detectors.

entities.name: DRX Plus Detectors
entities.evidence: Choose from the DRX Plus Detectors, the glass-free Lux 35 Detector or our single-shot DRX-L Detector for long-length imaging.

entities.name: Lux 35 Detector
entities.evidence: The Lux 35 Detector is glass-free and features a sleek, ergonomic design for easier handling and positioning.

entities.name: DRX-L Detector
entities.evidence: For long-bone and spine imaging, the DRX-L Detector is the ideal solution as it captures long-length images in a single exposure.

entities.name: Focus Detectors
entities.evidence: Choose the Focus Detectors for an affordable upgrade to full, wireless DR imaging.

concepts.name: Wireless digital radiography upgrade
concepts.evidence: Upgrade your current room to full wireless DR in a day.

concepts.name: ISO 4090 cassette compatibility
concepts.evidence: It’s compatible with any X-ray system that uses ISO 4090-compliant 35x43, 43x43 and 25x30 cm cassettes.

concepts.name: Direct-Connect Mode
concepts.evidence: In Direct-Connect Mode the exposure control is connected via a hardwire link to the generator.

concepts.name: Beam-Detect Mode
concepts.evidence: In Beam-Detect Mode there is no wired connection between the console and the OEM generator.

concepts.name: X-Factor Detector Platform
concepts.evidence: With the X-Factor Detector Platform, our wireless DRX and Lux Detectors work across all your DRX equipment.

evidence.claim: The document is a Carestream DRX-1 System brochure.
evidence.evidenceText: DRX-1 System Powerful. Versatile. Wireless. Upgrade Your X-ray Room to DR in One Day.

evidence.claim: The DRX-1 System can upgrade an existing X-ray room to wireless DR in one day.
evidence.evidenceText: Upgrade your current room to full wireless DR in a day.

evidence.claim: The DRX-1 System is compatible with X-ray systems using ISO 4090-compliant 35x43, 43x43 and 25x30 cm cassettes.
evidence.evidenceText: It’s compatible with any X-ray system that uses ISO 4090-compliant 35x43, 43x43 and 25x30 cm cassettes.

evidence.claim: The CARESTREAM DRX-1 System works with DRX Plus, Lux 35 and Focus Detectors.
evidence.evidenceText: The CARESTREAM DRX-1 System works with our DRX Plus, Lux 35 and Focus Detectors.

evidence.claim: The DRX-L Detector captures leg and spine images in a single exposure.
evidence.evidenceText: And for long-length imaging exams, our DRX-L Detector captures leg and spine images in a single exposure.

evidence.claim: DRX Plus 3543 and DRX Plus 4343 Detectors use a Gadolinium scintillator for general radiography imaging.
evidence.evidenceText: Our DRX Plus 3543 and DRX Plus 4343 Detectors use a Gadolinium (GOS) Scintillator for general radiography imaging.

evidence.claim: DRX Plus 3543C and DRX Plus 4343C Detectors use a Cesium scintillator for pediatrics and other dose-sensitive applications.
evidence.evidenceText: The DRX Plus 3543C and DRX Plus 4343C Detectors’ Cesium (CsI) Scintillator is ideal for pediatrics and other dose-sensitive applications.

evidence.claim: The small-format DRX Plus 2530C Detector is described as ideal for pediatrics and orthopaedic tabletop applications.
evidence.evidenceText: The small-format DRX Plus 2530C Detector is ideal for pediatrics as well as orthopaedic tabletop applications.

evidence.claim: The Lux 35 Detector is glass-free and designed for easier handling and positioning.
evidence.evidenceText: The Lux 35 Detector is glass-free and features a sleek, ergonomic design for easier handling and positioning.

evidence.claim: The brochure identifies Carestream Health, Inc. and a 2022 copyright.
evidence.evidenceText: © Carestream Health, Inc., 2022. CARESTREAM is a trademark of Carestream Health. CAT 200 0096 01/22

evidence.claim: Direct-Connect Mode connects exposure control to the generator by hardwire link.
evidence.evidenceText: In Direct-Connect Mode the exposure control is connected via a hardwire link to the generator.

evidence.claim: Beam-Detect Mode has no wired connection between the console and the OEM generator.
evidence.evidenceText: In Beam-Detect Mode there is no wired connection between the console and the OEM generator.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not name FDA or any regulatory authority; authorityOrJurisdiction is left empty.
No explicit revision or version number is stated in the source text.
Document date is represented only as footer/catalog date text '01/22' with copyright 2022, not as a clearly labeled issue date.
